Pepper__bell___Bacterial_spot.name: Pepper Bell Bacterial Spot
symptoms: green to dark brown lesions, stem canker, tattered appearance on affected leafs
treatments: treat seeds before planting, streptomycin, remove infected crop and weeds

Potato___Early_blight.name: Potato Early Blight
symptoms: round brown spots on leafs, tissue around infection is yellowing, infected leafs browning and falling
treatments: cover the soil under the plants with mulch, water at the base of the plant, pruning the bottom leaves

Potato___Late_blight.name: Potato Late Blight
symptoms: dark lesions with a greasy appearance, fuzzy growth on the underside of the leaf, cool weather
treatments: removed disease leafs or plants, water at the base of the plant, cover the soil under the plants with mulch

Tomato_Bacterial_spot.name: Tomato Bacterial Spot
symptoms: green to dark brown lesions, stem canker, tattered appearance on affected leafs
treatments: washing seeds in diluted clorox, streptomycin, remove infected crop and weeds

Tomato_Early_blight.name: Tomato Early Blight
symptoms: round brown spots on leafs, tissue around infection is yellowing, infected leafs browning and falling
treatments: cover the soil under the plants with mulch, water at the base of the plant, pruning the bottom leaves

Tomato_Late_blight.name: Tomato Late Blight
symptoms: dark lesions with a greasy appearance, fuzzy growth on the underside of the leaf, cool weather
treatments: removed disease leafs or plants, water at the base of the plant, cover the soil under the plants with mulch

Tomato_Septoria_leaf_spot.name: Tomato Septoria Leaf Spot
symptoms: circular spots, many spots on one leaf, leaves turn yellowish to brown
treatments: fungicidal sprays, removed diseased leaves, improve air circulation around the plants

Tomato_Spider_mites_Two_spotted_spider_m.name: Tomato Spider Mites Two Spotted Spider Mite
symptoms: tiny white or yellow spots, leaves looked blonde or bleached, webbing around the plant
treatments: keep plants well-watered, provide propure mulching, physically remove the mites

Tomato__Target_Spot.name: Tomato Target Spot
symptoms: brown or black spots the size of a pencil tip, lesions with dark centers, infected leaves falling
treatments: improve air circulation around the plant, avoid over-fertilization, apply fungicides

Tomato__Tomato_YellowLeaf__Curl_Virus.name: Tomato Yellow Leaf Curl Virus
symptoms: yellowing leaves curling upward, leaves are smaller than normal, reduced fruit production
treatments: removing infected plants, remove weeds that can be hosts, mulch underneath the plants

Tomato__Tomato_mosaic_virus.name: Tomato Mosaic Virus
symptoms: mosiac light and dark green pattern on leaves, curled or deformed leaves, yellow streaks
treatments: treat seeds before planting, sanitize tools, remove infected plants
